name: Peanut Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the milk, corn syrup, sugar, and baking chocolate in a heavy 2-quart saucepan.
2. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly until the sugar is dissolved.
3. Continue cooking over medium heat until the candy reaches the soft ball stage (236°F) on a candy thermometer.
4. Stir occasionally to prevent sticking. Remove from the heat and add the butter.
5. Cool to 110°F without stirring, then add the vanilla extract.
6. Beat until the fudge begins to lose its shine.
7. Stir in the chopped peanuts.
8. Quickly pour into a greased 8-inch square baking pan.
9. Cut into squares when the candy is completely cooled. Makes 1 1/2 pounds.
